authors: Nadja Schaetz Anna Schjøtt a Hamburg University
raw_title: AI Hype and its Function: An Ethnographic Study of the Local News AI Initiative of the Associated Press
title_en: AI Hype and its Function: An Ethnographic Study of the Local News AI Initiative of the Associated Press
title_zh: AI Hype and its Function: An Ethnographic Study of the Local News AI Initiative of the Associated Press
plain_summary_en: This paper studies AI Hype and its Function: An Ethnographic Study of the Local News AI Initiative of the Associated Press. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is The, Hype, And, Its. The abstract suggests a mixed methods approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
plain_summary_zh: This paper studies AI Hype and its Function: An Ethnographic Study of the Local News AI Initiative of the Associated Press. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is The, Hype, And, Its. The abstract suggests a mixed methods approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
research_direction_en: The paper points to an active research direction around The, Hype, And, Its, especially how institutions, platforms, and audiences shape communication outcomes.
research_direction_zh: The paper points to an active research direction around The, Hype, And, Its, especially how institutions, platforms, and audiences shape communication outcomes.
